requirement_topic.en: Energy-Efficiency Labelling — MINEM Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——MINEM 能效标识（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——MINEM 能效標識（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）

summary.en: Peru operates a national Energy-Efficiency Labelling regime (Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica) administered by MINEM (Ministerio de Energia y Minas). Under the Ley de Promocion del Uso Eficiente de la Energia (Law 27345) and its regulation (Reglamento, DS 053-2007-EM) and successive technical-labelling regulations, regulated equipment categories must carry an efficiency label showing the product's energy class so consumers can compare. Lighting products, where included in the regulated scope, must display the MINEM efficiency label at point of sale. The labelling threshold/class methodology and the precise lighting sub-categories in scope are defined by MINEM's labelling regulations and the corresponding NTP test methods (adopting IEC photometric/efficacy test methods); exporters must verify the current scope and the class boundaries for their specific lamp/luminaire type. This is the closest Peruvian counterpart to the EU's Ecodesign + energy-label regime, but it is a labelling/efficiency-disclosure regime rather than an EU-style minimum-performance market ban.
summary.zh: 秘鲁实行由 MINEM（能源与矿业部）管理的国家能效标识制度（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）。依据《能源高效利用促进法》（第 27345 号法律）及其条例（Reglamento，DS 053-2007-EM）和后续技术标识法规，受管制设备类别须贴附显示产品能效等级的标识，以便消费者比较。照明产品在纳入受管制范围时，须在销售点显示 MINEM 能效标识。标识阈值/等级方法及具体纳入范围的照明子类别由 MINEM 标识法规及相应 NTP 试验方法（采用 IEC 光度/光效试验方法）确定；出口商须核验其具体灯/灯具类型的现行范围及等级边界。这是与欧盟生态设计 + 能效标签制度最接近的秘鲁对应制度，但其为标识/能效披露制度，而非欧盟式的最低性能市场禁入。
summary.zht: 秘魯實行由 MINEM（能源與礦業部）管理的國家能效標識制度（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）。依據《能源高效利用促進法》（第 27345 號法律）及其條例（Reglamento，DS 053-2007-EM）和後續技術標識法規，受管制設備類別須貼附顯示產品能效等級的標識，以便消費者比較。照明產品在納入受管制範圍時，須在銷售點顯示 MINEM 能效標識。標識閾值/等級方法及具體納入範圍的照明子類別由 MINEM 標識法規及相應 NTP 試驗方法（採用 IEC 光度/光效試驗方法）確定；出口商須核驗其具體燈/燈具類型的現行範圍及等級邊界。這是與歐盟生態設計 + 能效標籤制度最接近的秘魯對應制度，但其為標識/能效披露制度，而非歐盟式的最低性能市場禁入。

standards_or_laws: Ley 27345 — Ley de Promocion del Uso Eficiente de la Energia (Peru)
DS 053-2007-EM — Reglamento de la Ley de Promocion del Uso Eficiente de la Energia, and successive MINEM energy-efficiency labelling regulations (Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica)
NTP test methods adopting IEC photometric/efficacy methods (referenced by the MINEM labelling regime)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires / light sources), which defines absolute lm/W efficiency grades (Grade 1 highest, down to a Grade 3 minimum for market entry). The China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 is mandatory for in-scope LED products, with registration via CQC/CECP and administration by SAMR. The CEL shows the grade based on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the China Energy Label registration and Peru's MINEM Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica scheme — they are separate national regimes.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品/光源能效要求），规定绝对 lm/W 能效等级（1 级最高，至 3 级为市场准入最低）。GB 30255 下的中国能效标识（CEL）对范围内 LED 产品为强制要求，经 CQC/CECP 注册、由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示等级。中国能效标识注册与秘鲁 MINEM 能效标识（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）方案之间不存在互认——二者为各自的国家制度。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品/光源能效要求），規定絕對 lm/W 能效等級（1 級最高，至 3 級為市場准入最低）。GB 30255 下的中國能效標識（CEL）對範圍內 LED 產品為強制要求，經 CQC/CECP 注冊、由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示等級。中國能效標識註冊與秘魯 MINEM 能效標識（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）方案之間不存在互認——二者為各自的國家制度。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires / light sources (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both Peru (MINEM Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica) and China (China Energy Label under GB 30255) operate mandatory energy-efficiency labelling for in-scope products, but they are separate non-mutual regimes: a product registered/labelled for China is not accepted in Peru, and vice versa. Key differences: (1) the Peruvian label class methodology and the precise in-scope lighting sub-categories are defined by MINEM regulation — they do not map one-to-one onto China's absolute lm/W Grade 1-3, so a CN grade does not determine the Peruvian class; (2) the EU's Ecodesign minimum-performance ban (a product below threshold cannot be sold) has no direct Peruvian equivalent — Peru's regime is primarily a labelling/disclosure obligation, so under-performing products are generally labelled rather than banned (verify whether any minimum applies to the specific category); (3) the label must be shown at point of sale in Peru in Spanish; (4) testing should use the NTP/IEC photometric methods and reflect 220 V, 60 Hz operation. Exporters should confirm with MINEM and the in-country importer whether their specific lamp/luminaire type is currently in the labelled scope.
gap.zh: 秘鲁（MINEM 能效标识）与中国（GB 30255 下的中国能效标识）均对范围内产品实行强制能效标识，但为各自不互认的制度：在中国注册/标识的产品不被秘鲁接受，反之亦然。主要差异：（1）秘鲁标识等级方法及具体纳入范围的照明子类别由 MINEM 法规确定——其与中国绝对 lm/W 的 1-3 级并非一一对应，故中国等级不能决定秘鲁等级；（2）欧盟生态设计的最低性能禁入（低于阈值不得销售）在秘鲁没有直接对应——秘鲁制度主要为标识/披露义务，故性能不足的产品一般被标识而非禁售（请核实具体类别是否存在最低值）；（3）在秘鲁须以西班牙文在销售点展示标识；（4）检测应采用 NTP/IEC 光度方法并反映 220 V、60 Hz 运行。出口商应与 MINEM 及当地进口商确认其具体灯/灯具类型当前是否处于标识范围内。
gap.zht: 秘魯（MINEM 能效標識）與中國（GB 30255 下的中國能效標識）均對範圍內產品實行強制能效標識，但為各自不互認的制度：在中國註冊/標識的產品不被秘魯接受，反之亦然。主要差異：（1）秘魯標識等級方法及具體納入範圍的照明子類別由 MINEM 法規確定——其與中國絕對 lm/W 的 1-3 級並非一一對應，故中國等級不能決定秘魯等級；（2）歐盟生態設計的最低性能禁入（低於閾值不得銷售）在秘魯沒有直接對應——秘魯制度主要為標識/披露義務，故性能不足的產品一般被標識而非禁售（請核實具體類別是否存在最低值）；（3）在秘魯須以西班牙文在銷售點展示標識；（4）檢測應採用 NTP/IEC 光度方法並反映 220 V、60 Hz 運行。出口商應與 MINEM 及當地進口商確認其具體燈/燈具類型當前是否處於標識範圍內。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — products within the MINEM Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica regulated lighting scope must display the Peruvian efficiency label at point of sale; verify the current in-scope lighting sub-categories and class boundaries with MINEM
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required for in-scope LED products under GB 30255

source.publisher: MINEM (Ministerio de Energia y Minas) — Gobierno del Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru's closest counterpart to EU Ecodesign + energy label is the MINEM Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica regime — a mandatory point-of-sale efficiency label for in-scope products, not an EU-style minimum-performance ban. It is a separate, non-mutual regime from China's GB 30255 China Energy Label, and a CN grade does not map onto the Peruvian class. Confirm whether your specific lamp/luminaire type is in the current MINEM scope, test to NTP/IEC photometric methods at 220 V/60 Hz, and arrange the Spanish-language label via the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁与欧盟生态设计 + 能效标签最接近的对应制度是 MINEM 能效标识（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）——对范围内产品强制的销售点能效标识，而非欧盟式最低性能禁入。其与中国 GB 30255 中国能效标识为各自不互认的制度，中国等级不能映射至秘鲁等级。请确认您的具体灯/灯具类型是否处于现行 MINEM 范围，按 NTP/IEC 光度方法在 220 V/60 Hz 下检测，并经当地进口商办理西班牙文标识。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯與歐盟生態設計 + 能效標籤最接近的對應制度是 MINEM 能效標識（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）——對範圍內產品強制的銷售點能效標識，而非歐盟式最低性能禁入。其與中國 GB 30255 中國能效標識為各自不互認的制度，中國等級不能映射至秘魯等級。請確認您的具體燈/燈具類型是否處於現行 MINEM 範圍，按 NTP/IEC 光度方法在 220 V/60 Hz 下檢測，並經當地進口商辦理西班牙文標識。

requirement_topic.en: Performance & Photometric Test Methods — NTP/IEC Efficacy and Lumen Maintenance
requirement_topic.zh: 性能与光度试验方法——NTP/IEC 光效与光通维持率
requirement_topic.zht: 性能與光度試驗方法——NTP/IEC 光效與光通維持率

summary.en: The performance claims underlying the MINEM efficiency label (luminous efficacy in lm/W, luminous flux, correlated colour temperature, and lumen maintenance/lifetime) must be substantiated using the photometric and performance test methods of the relevant Peruvian NTP standards, which adopt IEC methods (e.g., IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamps performance and the IEC LM-measurement framework). Unlike the EU Ecodesign Regulation, Peru does not impose a single horizontal binding minimum efficacy / minimum CRI / minimum lifetime / minimum power factor across all lighting products as a precondition to market access; instead, performance values are measured to NTP/IEC methods and disclosed via the MINEM label, with any binding minimums applying only where a specific Reglamento Tecnico sets them for a category. Tests should reflect the Peruvian 220 V, 60 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 支撑 MINEM 能效标识的性能声明（lm/W 光效、光通量、相关色温及光通维持率/寿命）须采用相关秘鲁 NTP 标准的光度与性能试验方法证实，这些标准采用 IEC 方法（如 IEC 62612 自镇流 LED 灯性能及 IEC 的 LM 测量框架）。与欧盟生态设计法规不同，秘鲁并未对所有照明产品施加单一横向约束性的最低光效/最低显色指数/最低寿命/最低功率因数作为市场准入前提；而是按 NTP/IEC 方法测量性能值并经 MINEM 标识披露，任何约束性最低值仅在特定技术规范为某类别设定时适用。检测应反映秘鲁 220 V、60 Hz 供电。
summary.zht: 支撐 MINEM 能效標識的性能聲明（lm/W 光效、光通量、相關色溫及光通維持率/壽命）須採用相關秘魯 NTP 標準的光度與性能試驗方法證實，這些標準採用 IEC 方法（如 IEC 62612 自鎮流 LED 燈性能及 IEC 的 LM 測量框架）。與歐盟生態設計法規不同，秘魯並未對所有照明產品施加單一橫向約束性的最低光效/最低顯色指數/最低壽命/最低功率因數作為市場准入前提；而是按 NTP/IEC 方法測量性能值並經 MINEM 標識披露，任何約束性最低值僅在特定技術規範為某類別設定時適用。檢測應反映秘魯 220 V、60 Hz 供電。

standards_or_laws: NTP adoptions of IEC 62612 (self-ballasted LED lamp performance) and related IEC photometric / lumen-maintenance methods (INACAL)
MINEM Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica labelling regulations (define which measured values are disclosed)
Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) where binding minimum performance is set for a category

summary.en: China's GB 30255 defines binding absolute lm/W efficiency grades (Grade 3 minimum for market entry), and the GB performance standards (e.g., GB/T 24823 / related) define photometric and lumen-maintenance methods derived from IEC. The China Energy Label discloses the efficiency grade. China's GB 30255 sets a market-entry minimum efficiency (Grade 3, e.g., ~70 lm/W for room luminaires), but does not bind CRI, lifetime, and power factor minimums across all product types in the same comprehensive way the EU Ecodesign Regulation does. GB performance test reports are issued under the Chinese system and are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 30255 规定约束性绝对 lm/W 能效等级（3 级为市场准入最低），GB 性能标准（如 GB/T 24823/相关标准）规定源自 IEC 的光度与光通维持率方法。中国能效标识披露能效等级。中国 GB 30255 设定市场准入最低能效（3 级，如室内照明约 70 lm/W），但未像欧盟生态设计法规那样对所有产品类型全面约束显色指数、寿命及功率因数最低值。GB 性能检测报告系在中国体系下出具，不被接受为秘鲁合格评定证据。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 30255 規定約束性絕對 lm/W 能效等級（3 級為市場准入最低），GB 性能標準（如 GB/T 24823/相關標準）規定源自 IEC 的光度與光通維持率方法。中國能效標識披露能效等級。中國 GB 30255 設定市場准入最低能效（3 級，如室內照明約 70 lm/W），但未像歐盟生態設計法規那樣對所有產品類型全面約束顯色指數、壽命及功率因數最低值。GB 性能檢測報告系在中國體系下出具，不被接受為秘魯合格評定證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires / light sources (binding lm/W grades)
GB/T 24823 / related GB performance standards (photometric / lumen-maintenance methods derived from IEC)

gap.en: Both Peru and China use IEC-derived photometric/lumen-maintenance methods, so the measurement technical base overlaps. Key differences in the regulatory effect: (1) China sets a binding market-entry minimum efficiency (GB 30255 Grade 3) — a product below it cannot be sold in China; Peru, by contrast, primarily discloses the measured class via the MINEM label and imposes a binding minimum only where a specific Reglamento Tecnico does so, so the Peruvian regime is closer to disclosure than to the EU/CN minimum-performance ban; (2) the EU's comprehensive binding minimums for CRI, lifetime and power factor have no direct horizontal Peruvian equivalent (verify per category); (3) Chinese GB performance reports are not accepted as Peruvian evidence — NTP/IEC method reports (ideally CB/accredited) should be prepared; (4) measurements should be taken at 220 V, 60 Hz (China 50 Hz), which can affect driver efficiency and any frequency-dependent performance. Exporters should re-confirm efficacy/lumen-maintenance figures at 60 Hz and prepare the disclosure values MINEM requires.
gap.zh: 秘鲁与中国均采用源自 IEC 的光度/光通维持率方法，测量技术基础重叠。监管效果的主要差异：（1）中国设定约束性市场准入最低能效（GB 30255 3 级）——低于该值不得在中国销售；相比之下，秘鲁主要经 MINEM 标识披露所测等级，仅在特定技术规范设定时才施加约束性最低值，故秘鲁制度更接近披露而非欧盟/中国的最低性能禁入；（2）欧盟对显色指数、寿命及功率因数的全面约束性最低值在秘鲁没有直接的横向对应（请按类别核实）；（3）中国 GB 性能报告不被接受为秘鲁证据——应准备 NTP/IEC 方法报告（最好为 CB/经认可）；（4）测量应在 220 V、60 Hz 下进行（中国 50 Hz），这会影响驱动器效率及任何依赖频率的性能。出口商应在 60 Hz 下重新确认光效/光通维持率数据，并准备 MINEM 所需的披露值。
gap.zht: 秘魯與中國均採用源自 IEC 的光度/光通維持率方法，測量技術基礎重疊。監管效果的主要差異：（1）中國設定約束性市場准入最低能效（GB 30255 3 級）——低於該值不得在中國銷售；相比之下，秘魯主要經 MINEM 標識披露所測等級，僅在特定技術規範設定時才施加約束性最低值，故秘魯制度更接近披露而非歐盟/中國的最低性能禁入；（2）歐盟對顯色指數、壽命及功率因數的全面約束性最低值在秘魯沒有直接的橫向對應（請按類別核實）；（3）中國 GB 性能報告不被接受為秘魯證據——應準備 NTP/IEC 方法報告（最好為 CB/經認可）；（4）測量應在 220 V、60 Hz 下進行（中國 50 Hz），這會影響驅動器效率及任何依賴頻率的性能。出口商應在 60 Hz 下重新確認光效/光通維持率數據，並準備 MINEM 所需的披露值。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — performance must be measured to NTP/IEC photometric methods to support the MINEM label; binding minimum efficacy/CRI/lifetime/power factor applies only where a specific Reglamento Tecnico sets it for the category (no single horizontal EU-style minimum)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory minimum — GB 30255 sets a binding market-entry minimum efficiency grade (Grade 3); China Energy Label discloses the grade

source.publisher: MINEM (Ministerio de Energia y Minas) — Gobierno del Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru substantiates lighting performance through NTP/IEC photometric and lumen-maintenance methods to support the MINEM efficiency label, but unlike the EU Ecodesign Regulation it does not impose a single horizontal binding minimum efficacy/CRI/lifetime/power factor across all products — binding minimums apply only where a specific Reglamento Tecnico sets them. China's GB 30255 by contrast does set a binding market-entry minimum grade. Chinese GB performance reports are not accepted as Peruvian evidence; prepare NTP/IEC (ideally CB/accredited) reports measured at 220 V, 60 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁通过 NTP/IEC 光度与光通维持率方法证实照明性能以支撑 MINEM 能效标识，但与欧盟生态设计法规不同，其未对所有产品施加单一横向约束性的最低光效/显色指数/寿命/功率因数——约束性最低值仅在特定技术规范设定时适用。相比之下，中国 GB 30255 设定约束性市场准入最低等级。中国 GB 性能报告不被接受为秘鲁证据；请准备在 220 V、60 Hz 下测量的 NTP/IEC（最好为 CB/经认可）报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯通過 NTP/IEC 光度與光通維持率方法證實照明性能以支撐 MINEM 能效標識，但與歐盟生態設計法規不同，其未對所有產品施加單一橫向約束性的最低光效/顯色指數/壽命/功率因數——約束性最低值僅在特定技術規範設定時適用。相比之下，中國 GB 30255 設定約束性市場准入最低等級。中國 GB 性能報告不被接受為秘魯證據；請準備在 220 V、60 Hz 下測量的 NTP/IEC（最好為 CB/經認可）報告。
